originalTitle: 'The gravest crime against humanity': What does the UN vote on slavery mean?
title: 'The gravest crime against humanity': What does the UN vote on slavery mean?
content: African and Caribbean nations want countries which benefited from slavery to pay compensation but it will not be straightforward.

originalTitle: Women secretly filmed, then ridiculed and abused online
title: Women secretly filmed, then ridiculed and abused online
content: Women in Kenya and Ghana tell the BBC about being approached by a Russian man who later posts videos of them without their consent.

originalTitle: South Africa's exclusion from G7 summit no surprise, says Ramaphosa
title: South Africa's exclusion from G7 summit no surprise, says Ramaphosa
content: Reports say the US pressured France to rescind Ramaphosa’s invitation after Trump threatened to boycott the summit.

originalTitle: Morocco claims AFCON case closed, despite Senegal appeals to CAF and CAS
title: Morocco claims AFCON case closed, despite Senegal appeals to CAF and CAS
content: Morocco believe their successful appeal against their 1-0 defeat by Senegal means the case of the AFCON crown is closed.

originalTitle: At least 22 migrants die off Greece after 6 days at sea
title: At least 22 migrants die off Greece after 6 days at sea
content: Survivors tell authorities the bodies of those who died were thrown overboard by people smugglers.

originalTitle: Defending champion Aryna Sabalenka and Coco Gauff meet in Miami Open final
title: Defending champion Aryna Sabalenka and Coco Gauff meet in Miami Open final
content: Sabalenka seeks tennis's 'Sunshine Double', while Florida's own Gauff has reached the final for the first time.

originalTitle: Iran war splits older and younger conservatives - as pressure builds for Trump to find exit ramp
title: Iran war splits older and younger conservatives - as pressure builds for Trump to find exit ramp
content: More than a thousand miles from Washington, the conflict was a dominant topic of conversation at CPAC.

originalTitle: Gaza peace doubts deepen as attention shifts to Iran
title: Gaza peace doubts deepen as attention shifts to Iran
content: With the world focused on the Iran war, there is increasing uncertainty about what happens next for Gaza.

originalTitle: Tiger Woods released on bail after DUI arrest
title: Tiger Woods released on bail after DUI arrest
content: Tiger Woods, the 15-time golf major champion, is released on bail following his arrest on charges of driving under the influence following a car crash in Florida.

originalTitle: England players will support White - Henderson
title: England players will support White - Henderson
content: Jordan Henderson says England players will support Ben White after the Arsenal defender was booed by fans at Wembley in Friday's 1-1 draw with Uruguay.

originalTitle: McLeish stays as St Mirren boss until end of season
title: McLeish stays as St Mirren boss until end of season
content: Craig McLeish will continue as St Mirren interim manager until the end of the season, the Scottish Premiership club have confirmed.

originalTitle: When football turned to penalties to end 'cruel' system
title: When football turned to penalties to end 'cruel' system
content: No-one knew what to expect at football's first official penalty shootout - and no-one wanted to go down in history as the first to miss.
